name: Points Incremental | Ver 0.20-1
description:
As I love incremental games I decided to make one here. There are currently 8 points generators and 3 reset layers. Each reset layer has their own upgrade tree. Once you do rebirth, prestige or ascend then you earn one point that you can use in their upgrade trees. For now those trees are generated by ai as I need some time to make my own ones.

I tested it with DeepSeek and GPT 4.1 and I recommend to use GPT 4.1 (or mini 4o) as DeepSeek likes to act not that stable as GPT 4.1

If you don't want to waste money by using GPT then I recommend to use llm called Arcee Ai: Virtuoso Large. It handles the math much much better than DeepSeek.

If you have some issues just let me know. I will try to fix them.

Changelog:

Ver. 0.11

-added sub generators. First sub generator is available from first prestige. The rest are in the prestige upgrade tree.

Ver. 0.12

-added save and load feature. I made this in case, If ai would struggle with the math and other things. Just say you want to create a save file or load one and ai will do so. Then copy it and save on your PC or mobile device. Note: Keep in mind that upgrade trees are randomly generated. That means you may have other bonuses than the ones you had. And it will be like that until I make them by myself.

Ver. 0.12-1

-small changes in first message.

Ver. 0.12-2

-Forgot to include reset layer upgrade tree points in the 'save file'.

Ver. 0.13

-small optimalization. Pernament tokens reduced by 200.

-added first challange that is available after first prestige.

Ver. 0.20

-Rework of the 'game'. Instead of 8 generators there is now 4 and the rest four are available later.

-Instead of the bonuses to every level, now every other level adds the same amount of points per second. For example, If first level gives 10/s then another gives 20/s (explaining things is not my cup of the tea).

-Load and save feature is now disabled until I come up with better solution for it.

-Each reset layer now requires points. Previously, prestige and ascend required specified amount of lower reset layers.

Ver. 0.20-1

-small improvments.
creator: Frikser
